title: SIGSEGV on podman pod clone
body:
### Issue Description

`podman pod clone` crashes.
```console
# podman pod ps
POD ID        NAME            STATUS      CREATED        INFRA ID    # OF CONTAINERS
a411a6af9c75  pod_sni-router  Exited      5 minutes ago              3

root@RPi:~# podman pod clone pod_sni-router pod_sni-router_nokeepalive
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x270 pc=0x12de8ac]

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/specgen/generate.PodConfigToSpec(0x7f5319c960, 0x7f5349e388, 0x7f535674f0, {0x7fdf09be79?, 0x0?})
	/builder/shared-workdir/build/sdk/build_dir/target-aarch64_cortex-a72_musl/podman-5.8.2/pkg/specgen/generate/pod_create.go:380 +0x48c
github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/domain/infra/abi.(*ContainerEngine).PodClone(_, {_, _}, {{0x7fdf09be79, 0xe}, 0x0, {{0x0, 0x0}, {0x0, 0x0, ...}, ...}, ...})
	/builder/shared-workdir/build/sdk/build_dir/target-aarch64_cortex-a72_musl/podman-5.8.2/pkg/domain/infra/abi/pods.go:324 +0xe0
github.com/containers/podman/v5/cmd/podman/pods.clone(0x2b58c80, {0x7f5309f5e0?, 0x2?, 0x2?})
	/builder/shared-workdir/build/sdk/build_dir/target-aarch64_cortex-a72_musl/podman-5.8.2/cmd/podman/pods/clone.go:81 +0x1f0
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).execute(0x2b58c80, {0x7f530cc030, 0x2, 0x2})
	/builder/shared-workdir/build/sdk/build_dir/target-aarch64_cortex-a72_musl/podman-5.8.2/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1015 +0x814
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteC(0x2b46180)
	/builder/shared-workdir/build/sdk/build_dir/target-aarch64_cortex-a72_musl/podman-5.8.2/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1148 +0x350
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).Execute(...)
	/builder/shared-workdir/build/sdk/build_dir/target-aarch64_cortex-a72_musl/podman-5.8.2/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1071
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteContext(...)
	/builder/shared-workdir/build/sdk/build_dir/target-aarch64_cortex-a72_musl/podman-5.8.2/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1064
main.Execute()
	/builder/shared-workdir/build/sdk/build_dir/target-aarch64_cortex-a72_musl/podman-5.8.2/cmd/podman/root.go:121 +0x54
main.main()
	/builder/shared-workdir/build/sdk/build_dir/target-aarch64_cortex-a72_musl/podman-5.8.2/cmd/podman/main.go:74 +0x4d0
```

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: I believe this was fixed with https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28386. Can you try [building](https://podman.io/docs/installation#building-from-source) with the latest main?

Will do if I have a chance.
Thanks.
Closing this issue, but feel free to comment/refile if you're still running into this.
